basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on 21 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates within the age range of up to 28 years (with applicable relaxation) and holding a Post Graduate degree in basic science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE/National Eligibility Tests qualification are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from 21 April 2026 to 20 May 2026, and c

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female applicants, 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in basic science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National Eligibility Examinations conducted by Central government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DBT, DST, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, TCAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA @ NA % (if applicable)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20-05-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduate degree in basic science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course selected through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE/National Eligibility Tests.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA (if applicable).

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project needs, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC/SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the National Institute of Technology Rourkela, Rourkela, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. Does NIT Rourkela offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female applicants and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.
